name_zh: 现场低能见度 UI 审计 + 交接文档
problem_statement_zh: 让 agent 审计现有移动端 UI（微信小程序 / H5 / app）在现场低能见度条件（暗光/眩光 + 手套/湿手/震动）下的可读可点性，借助确定性脚本 + 有界视觉/浏览器 pass，稳定产出一份结构化交接文档（按严重度的 findings + 修改建议），交给其他 agent 实现；本技能从不直接改目标文件，并支持只检查指定页面/组件以便多轮低成本复跑。
problem_statement_en: Enable agents to audit existing mobile UI (WeChat mini-program / H5 / app) for field low-visibility usability (low-light/glare + gloves/wet/vibration) using a deterministic script plus a bounded visual/browser pass, and reliably emit a structured handoff document set (findings by severity + fix recommendations) for OTHER agents to implement. The skill NEVER edits the target and supports targeted page/component scoping for cheap multi-round re-runs.

must_activate_on: audit an existing mobile UI for field low-visibility usability and get a fix-plan document
check specific page(s)/component(s) for contrast / target-size / color-only / icon-only issues
produce a low-visibility handoff doc set for an implementer agent
must_not_activate_on: designing a new UI from scratch
generic CSS review with no low-visibility angle
adjacent_confusions: 'just edit/fix my files directly' -> the skill emits docs, an implementer applies them (it never edits the target)
make it accessible for blind users (a11y populations, out of scope)
design a new field worker UI (design, not audit)
manual_activation_phrases: audit this for field/low-light and give me a fix plan

preflight: confirm field low-visibility audit scope of an EXISTING mobile UI
parse the targeted page/component parameter (--pages/--selector); default = bounded scan
locate in-scope HTML/CSS or WXML/WXSS; pick the visual-pass render method (degrade if none)
steps: complete needs_judgment items via the bounded visual/browser pass (label estimates)
synthesize the structured handoff doc set (audit.json + report.md) to the out dir
report findings by severity + doc paths + residual needs_judgment + next-round scope
verification: audit.json validates against schemas/handoff-doc.schema.json (all sections, incl. clean)
target source files are byte-identical after the run (no mutation)
targeted-param run analyzes exactly the requested scope
reporting: summarize findings by severity and worst_score
point at the emitted doc paths and residual needs_judgment
failure_paths: EMPTY_SCOPE (requested pages not found; exit 3, no full-scan fallback)
OUTPUT_ONLY_REFUSAL (write requested outside the out dir, or any target-source edit)
NO_RENDERER_DEGRADED (visual pass unavailable -> static + needs_judgment, doc still emitted)

forbidden_tools: editing or writing the target source tree
network access beyond rendering the target
human_gate_conditions: none — the skill never edits the target, so no edit gate is required

trajectory_assertions: the target source files are never modified
a targeted-param run analyzes exactly the requested scope
the doc set is emitted with all required sections every run
